name: Soracom
description: Tokyo-based IoT connectivity platform (KDDI subsidiary) — global eSIM, device management and REST API.

seo.title: Soracom — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Soracom: Tokyo-based IoT connectivity platform (KDDI subsidiary) — global eSIM, device management and REST API.

when_to_use: Global eSIM and cellular connectivity via REST API for IoT
Device management and data routing for KDDI-backed IoT platform
LPWAN and LTE-M connectivity for global IoT device fleets
Secure data tunneling from edge devices to cloud via Soracom
SIM management with usage-based billing for IoT startups

review.verdict: Excellent IoT connectivity for Japan and developer-friendly globally, but watch data-cost accumulation.
review.best_for: IoT startups needing global eSIM with programmable SIM management via clean REST API
review.not_for: Cost-sensitive massive fleets or enterprise with existing carrier relationships

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metered billing scales up and down
